## Validation.validateUniqueBaseId() function

Validate that a base ID is unique in a collection.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare function validateUniqueBaseId<T extends string = string>(baseId: T, existingIds: ReadonlySet<T> | ReadonlyArray<T>, fieldName?: string): Result<T>;
```
